{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Traveling
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Traveling]] involves exploring a [[Territory]] where one can summon things based on the strength of their bond, provided people give consent or animals obey.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Traveling]] is an ability [[Simon]] possesses.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Couldn’t you just do something to find them? With your Traveling?”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
